column1: あなたともあろう人がなぜそんな失敗をしたのか。
column2: あなたともあろうひとがなぜそんなしっぱいをしたのか。
column3: Why would someone of your standing make such a mistake?
column4: ともあろう (of all people/things ~; someone of their stature)
column5: Noun + ともあろう + [person/entity] + が
column6: expresses surprise or criticism that someone of a high status did something unexpected or inappropriate
column8: ともあろう = surprise at status-inappropriate act; にしては = for/given that (deviation from expectation); まじき = unworthy of (action-focused); ほどの人が = a person of that level
column10: module:05-n1 jlpt:n1 point:ともあろう source:authored source:shin-kanzen frequency:top5k complexity:standard
